sections.title: Purpose
sections.summary: Orchestrated shipping pipeline for AI-assisted game teams.

sections.title: Ship Full
sections.summary: Use for: - player-facing changes - infra or deploy changes - economy changes - security-sensitive changes - multi-system work Responsibilities: - full review routing - broader test

sections.title: Key Question
sections.summary: What is the cheapest safe path to confidence for this change?
